page_metadata.biotools__summary: Web server for particle motility analysis such as cytoskeleton. Input is X,Y coordinates of objects in time and output is novel analyses, graphical plots and statistics for motile objects.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Web server for particle motility analysis such as cytoskeleton. Input is X,Y coordinates of objects in time and output is novel analyses, graphical plots and statistics for motile objects.
